name: rule-engine closed-loop step plugin-install flows an org-slash-repo through the install pipeline
command: mkdir -p stub-clones/acme/example && printf 'name: example\nrules: [{id: foo, detector: x}]\n' > stub-clones/acme/example/plugin.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rule-engine/closed-loop-test.sh" --step plugin-install --plugin acme/example --gh-clone-stub stub-clones --rule-tester-stub pass --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'plugin_install_planned=true' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
